title: Calcite
description: Better experience for commanders. Tweaks command block UI.
body:
# Calcite: Better experience for commanders

This mod is under heavy development! Feel free to suggest any command-related features on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/nutyworks/Calcite/issues)!

### Features

**Replaces vanilla Command Block GUI with custom GUI.**
  - Shows the tooltip when the ctrl (or command) key is pressed while hovering over an argument. Supports item, text component, and NBT compounds.
  - Also opens connected Command Blocks.
  - Changed commands are outlined in yellow.
  - Blocks closing the screen with the ESC key if the command is modified.
  - Still works even if `sendCommandFeedback` is set to `true`.
